hero.description: I create advanced web applications and e-commerce stores. I specialize in PHP, Laravel, WordPress/WooCommerce, and React — fast, solid, and with business understanding.

wp.title: WordPress & WooCommerce
wp.desc: Advanced e-commerce stores, custom plugins, payment integrations, and ERP systems. Performance and security come first.

php.title: PHP Backend
php.desc: Solid, scalable backend in pure PHP or using frameworks. APIs, management systems, business process automation.

laravel.title: Laravel
laravel.desc: SaaS applications, admin panels, booking systems, and marketplaces — built in Laravel with scalability and maintainability in mind.

frontend.title: React & Vue
frontend.desc: Modern SPAs, dashboards, and user interfaces integrated with PHP backend. Fast, responsive, and accessible.

brief.title: Discovery & Brief
brief.desc: Free 30-minute meeting to determine project scope, timeline, and budget.

contract.title: Quote & Contract
contract.desc: Detailed quote and B2B contract with clearly defined milestones.

dev.title: Development
dev.desc: Iterative work with regular updates and access to a testing environment.

launch.title: Launch & Support
launch.desc: Deployment to production server and 30 days of support after launch at no extra cost.

about.desc_1: I am an independent PHP developer with over 8 years of experience building e-commerce solutions and web applications for clients across Europe.
about.desc_2: I work exclusively in the B2B model — I issue VAT invoices, sign contracts, and treat every project as my own business.
perks: Flexible working hours, including remote collaboration
Code review and optimization of existing projects
Maintenance and expansion of legacy code

marek.quote: Collaboration at the highest level. WooCommerce store ready ahead of schedule, clean and well-documented code. I recommend to anyone looking for a solid B2B PHP developer.

anna.quote: Laravel application built from scratch in 6 weeks. Great communication, fair pricing, no surprises. We continue to work together.

piotr.quote: Migration of legacy PHP system to Laravel — smooth, no downtime. Code review revealed problems we didn't know about. Very professional approach.

contact.description: Describe your project — I'll get back to you within 24 hours with an initial assessment of scope and budget. For free.

form.name: Name and surname
form.success: ✓ Message sent! I'll get back to you within 24 hours.

pricing.description: Choose a collaboration model that fits your needs
